title: CKG Benchmark v0.6.2: Knowledge Retrieval Benchmark — CKG vs RAG vs GraphRAG
description:
Open, reproducible benchmark comparing three LLM knowledge retrieval architectures across 64 domains and 10,838 queries drawn from the McCreary Intelligent Textbook Corpus and the NVIDIA developer documentation corpus.

Key results (v0.6.2 locked):
- CKG Macro F1: 0.471 vs RAG 0.123 vs GraphRAG 0.120 (3.8× gap)
- Tokens per query: CKG 269 vs RAG 2,982 (11× fewer)
- 5-hop F1: CKG 0.772 vs RAG 0.170 (4.5× gap on hard multi-hop queries)
- Cost per 1,000 queries: CKG $7.81 vs RAG $76.23 (10× cheaper)

The benchmark includes structured CSV concept graphs (ConceptID, ConceptLabel, Dependencies, TaxonomyID), 10,838 generated benchmark queries across 5 query types (T1 entity lookup through T5 cross-concept), and full evaluation code. Ground truth is deterministic — derived from DAG edges, not human annotation.

Dataset also published at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/danyarm/ckg-benchmark
